title: I Am Out of Here (Quit/Disconnect Bind)
description: Are you REALLY tired of playing? Now you can quit your singleplayer world or a multiplayer server with the press of just one button.
body:
## **➤ This mod has a very simple purpose: Allow you to leave a world or server as quickly as possible!**
With this client-side mod, you can bind any button of your keyboard to instantly exit a multiplayer server or singleplayer world.

![Luisovc1812 left the game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e18a0eadb295235f908432f66fe60b8a2656748e.png)

**Set any bind you want in the game control settings (There is no default key)**

![Steve player exiting the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2872e110c0de4fc3c492962e9eeb6950f34e0709.png)

(Currently only available in version 1.20.4, but we plan to add it to other versions as well)
